tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All measured parameters are within normal limits except for a mildly decreased total cholesterol. Glycemic control, renal function, electrolytes, and lipid fractions are unremarkable. The low cholesterol may be age-related or due to nutritional status; clinical correlation is advised. No evidence of acute metabolic or renal disturbance.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
